shared.brandStrapline: Preparation with focus, clarity, and consistency.

confirmation.previewText: Confirm your account and start preparing your exam with Iberica Oposiciones.
confirmation.title: Confirm your email and activate your account
paragraphs: Your sign-up is almost finished. You only need to verify this email to access your dashboard and keep your progress from day one.
Once you confirm the link, you can enter Iberica Oposiciones and continue your preparation without extra steps.
confirmation.fallbackLabel: If the button does not work, copy this link and paste it into your browser.
confirmation.securityNote: If you did not create this account, you can ignore this message. The link is personal and may expire for security reasons.
confirmation.footerPrimary: Strong preparation comes from steady progress, not noise.
confirmation.footerSecondary: You keep your dashboard, study tools, and learning context in one place.

recovery.previewText: Reset your Iberica Oposiciones password securely.
recovery.title: Set a new password
paragraphs: We received a request to reset your password. Use the link below to create a new one and regain access to your account.
If you did not request this change, you do not need to do anything. Your account will stay protected unless this link is used.
recovery.fallbackLabel: If the button does not open correctly, copy this link and use it directly in your browser.
recovery.securityNote: For security reasons, this link can be used only once and may expire after a limited time.
recovery.footerPrimary: Recover access and get back to your dashboard without losing your pace.
recovery.footerSecondary: If you notice activity you do not recognize, review your sign-in details before continuing.

supportTicketReply.previewText: The team has replied to your support ticket.
supportTicketReply.title: Your ticket has a new reply
paragraphs: The team has replied to ticket __TICKET_CODE__ about "__TICKET_SUBJECT__".
Open the ticket chat to review the reply and continue the conversation if you need to add more information.
supportTicketReply.fallbackLabel: If the button does not work, copy this link and paste it into your browser.
supportTicketReply.securityNote: You receive this email because support notifications are enabled. You can change this preference from your profile.
supportTicketReply.footerPrimary: We keep your request in the same thread so all context stays organized.
supportTicketReply.footerSecondary: Internal notifications will also appear in your dashboard bell.
